entity.label: Eliezer
entity.subtitle: Male
entity.description: One of the priests who blew the trumpet before the ark when it was brought to Jerusalem (1 Chr. 15:24).

nodes.label: Eliezer
nodes.description: One of the priests who blew the trumpet before the ark when it was brought to Jerusalem (1 Chr. 15:24).

verses.text: And Shebaniah, and Jehoshaphat, and Nethaneel, and Amasai, and Zechariah, and Benaiah, and Eliezer, the priests, did blow with the trumpets before the ark of God: and Obededom and Jehiah were doorkeepers for the ark.
